relief_sought: Decree for recovery of INR 15,00,000 with interest at 12% p.a.
facts.facts_brief: Plaintiff supplied goods against purchase orders dated June-October 2025. Defendant issued post-dated cheques which were dishonoured. Demand notice under s.12A Commercial Courts Act issued and pre-institution mediation concluded without settlement.

relief_sought: Decree for specific performance of the agreement dated 01-05-2025
Permanent injunction restraining defendant from alienating the property
facts.facts_brief: Plaintiff entered into an agreement to sell for Flat 4B, Tower 2, Greater Kailash II. Full consideration of INR 95,00,000 paid. Defendant refused to execute the sale deed citing price escalation. Plaintiff is ready and willing to perform her part.

relief_sought: Permanent injunction restraining defendant from obstructing the plaintiff's right of way
Mandatory injunction to remove the wall built on 15-01-2026
facts.facts_brief: Plaintiff has been using a common passage adjoining the disputed wall for over 25 years. Defendant constructed a wall on 15-01-2026 blocking the passage. Easement by prescription is established.
